promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next existing intake batch after the Episode 01 archived-state reduction because it is the adjacent compact intent plaque in folder order.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the strongest archived posture, explicitness, A2-role, and memory-discipline signals in a compact form.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The Episode 01 A2-mid batch was used as an anchor so this compact intent plaque stays tied to thicker surrounding archived process history rather than being over-trusted in isolation.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred until the compact intent-manifest plaque was reduced into a smaller reusable archived packet.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The archived intent-manifest parent batch plus the Episode 01 comparison anchor were sufficient to isolate the reusable posture and memory-discipline packets for this pass.

candidate_items.name: ARCHIVED_INTENT_PLAQUE_NONAUTHORITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the plaque as a useful archived intent surface without letting its compactness self-authorize it.

candidate_items.name: CONSTRAINT_FIRST_VALIDATOR_NOT_PROOF_ENGINE_POSITION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's clearest archived purpose-positioning packet while keeping it source-local.

candidate_items.name: DECLARED_MODE_ANTI_SMOOTHING_EXPLICITNESS_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the manifest's strongest durable communication-hygiene spine.

candidate_items.name: A2_PRESERVATION_BOUNDARY_ROLE_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest archived A2 role statement in the manifest line.

candidate_items.name: APPEND_ONLY_LEAN_MEMORY_DISCIPLINE_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest concise memory-discipline wording while keeping its archived policy status visible.

candidate_items.name: COMPACT_INTENT_REQUIRES_THICKER_CONTEXT_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest guard against over-trusting the compact plaque without its surrounding archived process history.

quarantined_items.name: COMPACTNESS_AS_AUTHORITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Brevity and clarity do not convert the manifest into an authoritative or complete history surface.

quarantined_items.name: SIMS_ARE_FRUIT_AS_SETTLED_CURRENT_EVIDENCE_DOCTRINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The validator/sim relation here is archived intent wording and does not settle current evidence-layer debates.

quarantined_items.name: NO_PARALLEL_BRAINS_AS_CURRENT_ORCHESTRATION_LAW
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The single-brain policy remains archived wording and should not be auto-promoted into current orchestration law.

quarantined_items.name: LOW_VERBOSITY_PLUS_DENSE_NONCOMPRESSED_AS_RESOLVED_STYLE_FORMULA
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The manifest preserves this as a real style-pressure tension rather than a solved writing formula.

quarantined_items.name: STRUCTURED_EXTRACTION_ONLY_AS_SUFFICIENT_PATH_DEPENDENCE_PRESERVATION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The manifest itself preserves tension between lean extraction and path-dependence preservation, which thicker archived logs later expose more directly.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the strongest archived posture, explicitness, A2-role, and memory-discipline packets from the compact manifest.
They preserve the manifest as nonauthority reference material while tying it back to thicker archived process history.
They remain small, source-linked, and proposal-side for later archived-state synthesis.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain current-law overreads, style-formula collapses, or orchestration assumptions rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into active law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used the Episode 01 A2-mid batch only as a context anchor to keep this compact plaque from being over-trusted in isolation.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded archived intent-manifest reduction pass.
